vibe: High-Tech Synthesis. Replacing flat, muddy neomorphism with sharp, kinetic 'Tactile Neomorphism'. Precise, data-driven, engineered.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing & High Density Bento Grids.

tactile_neomorphism_card.description: A modern take on dark neomorphism incorporating soft cyan/purple glows.
tactile_neomorphism_card.classes: bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-2xl border border-white/5 shadow-[6px_6px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6),-4px_-4px_12px_rgba(157,76,221,0.06)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,242,254,0.15)] transition-all duration-300 p-8

glass_header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#1a1a2e]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

buttons.primary: relative inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3 text-sm font-mono tracking-wider text-white transition-all bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-lg border border-[#00f2fe]/30 shadow-[inset_0_0_10px_rgba(0,242,254,0.1),0_0_15px_rgba(0,242,254,0.1)] hover:shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(0,242,254,0.3),0_0_25px_rgba(0,242,254,0.2)] hover:border-[#00f2fe] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[#a0a0b8] hover:text-white transition-colors

data_pipeline_diagram.description: An animated SVG illustrating Source -> Ingest -> Transform -> DW. Use framer-motion to animate a glowing 'data packet' (circle) along the SVG path.
data_pipeline_diagram.paths: Dashed SVG lines (stroke-white/20) connecting the nodes.
data_pipeline_diagram.animation: A glowing cyan dot moving along the paths with easeInOut repeating.

hero.layout: Asymmetrical 2-column. Left: Typography + CTA. Right: Portrait image integrated with abstract glowing data nodes.
hero.heading_structure: Hi, I'm Om Patel. Architecting Data Flows.

about.layout: Bento Grid (md:grid-cols-12). Left side (col-span-12 lg:col-span-4): Neomorphic card with bio. Right side (col-span-12 lg:col-span-8): Neomorphic card housing the full animated Data Pipeline diagram.
about.pipeline_flow: Source Systems -> Ingestion -> Transform/Clean -> Data Warehouse.

experience.layout: Vertical timeline. A single glowing cyan vertical line on the left. Neomorphic cards for each role spaced out along the timeline.

skills.layout: Grid of small neomorphic pills/tiles. Grouped by: Data Engineering, Analytics, DevOps.
skills.tile_classes: bg-[#1e1e36] px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-mono text-[#a0a0b8] border border-white/5 hover:text-[#00f2fe] hover:border-[#00f2fe]/50 transition-all cursor-default

projects.layout: Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8). Each project is a large neomorphic card with abstract data visualization image, title, mono tags for tech stack, and a 'View Source' link.

education.layout: Simple list of neomorphic strips. Degree/Cert on left, Year on right.

contact.phrase: Data stuck in silos? Let's build pipelines that turn chaos into insights.
contact.cta: Mailto button styled as the Primary button.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) for hero elements.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use framer-motion 'whileInView' to fade in sections as they appear.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Interactive elements must lift (-translate-y-1) and intensify their cyan/purple box-shadow glow.
motion_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-mailto-btn').

hero_portrait.description: Professional portrait for the hero section.

abstract_data_1.description: Abstract blue glowing dots forming wave patterns, use as a subtle background or project thumbnail.

abstract_data_2.description: Black and green abstract curves, use for a project card thumbnail.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React.js (not TSX) application with Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT use pure white or pure black. Stick strictly to the #1a1a2e base.
Apply the `tactile_neomorphism_card` classes strictly as defined. Do not use standard Shadcn cards; build custom divs with these specific box-shadows.

Install `framer-motion` for animations. Build the Data Pipeline SVG in the About section as described: Use Framer Motion's `<motion.circle>` with a `pathLength` or raw `x,y` coordinates to make a glowing dot travel along an SVG line.
Install `@phosphor-icons/react` or `lucide-react` for Tech/DevOps icons (e.g., Database, FlowArrow, Server, GitMerge).
Configure Tailwind config to include the custom font families: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, links, and forms.
Ensure high contrast on the cyan/purple text highlights so they remain readable against the dark background. Use text-shadow if necessary.
